parameters.prompt: Photorealistic original full-body hard-surface EVA suit on one neutral adult human in a strict T-pose. Functional pressure garment under modular ceramic-composite helmet, collar, torso, shoulder, forearm, pelvis, thigh, shin and boot shells; compact life-support pack; sealed joints with believable flex gaps; clear laminated visor; tool mounts and rescue hardware. Industrial near-future engineering, not superhero armor, slim enough for ship corridors. Symmetric neutral lighting, no weapon, cape, text, logo, stand, or background clutter.

strengths: front, side and rear views describe one consistent T-pose suit
pressure garment, rigid shell layers, helmet and life-support pack are readable
neck, shoulder, elbow, hip and knee gaps provide a credible cleanup starting point
conditions: production suit is separated into named shell modules around an authored skeleton
visor thickness, pressure seals, joint clearance and corridor envelope are measured in Blender
generated wearer anatomy is reference only and cannot become the production character body
